title: PointsValuation
description: A loyalty balance valued in CAD. Provided by Module 1 (Rewards). Money: cad_value_cents is integer minor units; redemption_rate is decimal string (never float).

valuation_source.description: FR-REW-010: aggregated from spine, manually entered, or user-override custom rate. User-sourced provenance tag: `manual` and `user_override` are self-reported and server-side validated against sanity bounds; downstream consumers (Travel/Pay) MUST treat them as self-reported (discount/confirm) rather than authoritative.

base_rate.description: Direct cents-per-point, arbitrary-precision decimal as a string.

effective_rate.description: Transfer-aware best rate (>= base_rate); base_rate × best transfer_ratio × live bonus_multiplier, arbitrary precision (FR-REW-007).

cad_value_cents.description: round_half_up(points × effective_rate) to CAD cents, computed in arbitrary precision.

expiry.description: FR-REW-009. Default policy is 'unknown' — never assume non-expiring.
